title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SEBI - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SEBI - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at SEBI are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SEBI:
SEBI is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI!
